title: Find My Device - Play button
scenario: Verify that tapping the Play button in Find My Device shows a hearing safety warning dialog on first tap, then plays a tone on the headset on subsequent tap.
steps: Start app with headset paired and connected.
Tap Find My Device (allow GPS if prompted).
expected: 1. A warning dialog appears stating: "Warning! Exposure to high sound levels may cause permanent damage to your hearing. Make sure your device is not being worn by anyone before tapping 'Play' to send a tone."\n2. Dialog dismissed, user returns to device details page.\n3. Tone plays on headset, lights flash if applicable, "Sending tone..." message with animated stop button is shown.
